input: Summarize: Northfield Plastics LLC requests a $12.5M revolving credit facility. DSCR 1.42x. Primary risk: customer concentration, top customer is 38% of revenue.
mock_response: Northfield Plastics LLC seeks a $12.5M revolver. Coverage is adequate (DSCR 1.42x). Key risk: customer concentration, with the top customer at 38% of revenue.

input: Summarize: Harbor Logistics Inc., $8.0M term loan for fleet expansion, collateralized by rolling stock at 78% LTV. Covenant: minimum fixed charge coverage 1.20x.
mock_response: Harbor Logistics Inc. requests an $8.0M term loan to expand its fleet, secured by rolling stock (78% LTV). Covenants include minimum fixed charge coverage of 1.20x.

input: Summarize: Caldwell Dental Group, $3.2M practice acquisition loan. Seller financing covers 15%. Guarantor net worth $4.1M.
mock_response: Caldwell Dental Group seeks a $3.2M acquisition loan; the seller finances 15%. The guarantor reports a $4.1M net worth.

input: Summarize: Mesa Verde Hospitality, $22M construction loan for a 120-key hotel. Completion guaranty from sponsor. Risk: market RevPAR declined 6% YoY.
mock_response: Mesa Verde Hospitality requests a $22M construction loan for a 120-key hotel with a sponsor completion guaranty. Noted risk: market RevPAR fell 6% year over year.

input: Summarize: Pinnacle Ag Supply, $5.5M seasonal line, borrowing base of 80% eligible AR plus 50% inventory. Prior year peak utilization 92%.
mock_response: Pinnacle Ag Supply seeks a $5.5M seasonal line governed by a borrowing base (80% of eligible AR, 50% of inventory). Peak utilization last year was 92%.

input: Summarize: Brightline Medical Devices, $9.75M equipment financing, 84-month amortization. Risk flag: pending FDA 510(k) clearance on the product line the equipment supports.
mock_response: Brightline Medical Devices requests $9.75M in equipment financing on an 84-month amortization. Risk: the supported product line awaits FDA 510(k) clearance.

input: Summarize: Two Rivers Brewing, $1.8M expansion loan. DSCR 1.15x, below policy minimum of 1.25x; mitigant: 25% cash collateral pledge.
mock_response: Two Rivers Brewing seeks a $1.8M expansion loan. DSCR of 1.15x sits below the 1.25x policy minimum, mitigated by a 25% cash collateral pledge.

input: Summarize: Quarry Ridge Storage, $14.3M refinance of stabilized self-storage, 91% occupancy, debt yield 9.8%. Exception requested: 30-year amortization vs 25-year policy.
mock_response: Quarry Ridge Storage requests a $14.3M refinance of a stabilized self-storage asset (91% occupancy, 9.8% debt yield). Note: the requested 30-year amortization is an exception to the 25-year policy standard.
